arts.ttl: Ashley Young creates Premier League history and beats record held by ex-Man Utd teammate
arts.sum: Everton's Ashley Young has written himself into the Premier League history books by becoming the oldest ever scorer of a free-kick - with the all-time record also within his grasp

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister suspended for Merseyside derby against Everton
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister was given his fifth yellow card of the season against Newcastle United, therefore earning himself a suspension for Saturday's meeting with rivals Everton

arts.ttl: Premier League release statement to explain why VAR ruled out Everton goal vs Wolves
arts.sum: James Tarkowski had thought he had doubled Everton's lead at Goodison Park against Wolverhampton Wanderers

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Liverpool, Arsenal v Manchester United, and more – Premier League clockwatch live
arts.sum: Manchester City face Nottingham Forest, Southampton take on Chelsea, Everton host Wolves and Aston Villa play Brentford. Follow it all live Pep G and Man City host Nottingham Forest There is pressure on the City manager. If his team don’t emerge victorious tonight then Pep will have gone eight games without a win. That’s eight fingers! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Club open contact with Everton man’s entourage to ‘understand the feasibility’ of January transfer
arts.sum: Roma have initiated contact with Everton striker Beto’s entourage to discuss the feasibility of a move in the January transfer window. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that owners the Friedkins are keen to start talks ahead of January to boost Roma’s squad and turn around their fortunes. arts.ttl: Dovbyk disappoints as Roma seek reinforcements: Contacts made for Everton’s Beto
arts.sum: Roma are struggling to find positives in their current situation. Their latest defeat in the league against Atalanta has pushed the Giallorossi closer to the bottom of the table, with Ranieri being the third manager in just 14 matchdays. The post Dovbyk disappoints as Roma seek reinforcements: Contacts made for Everton’s Beto appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Friedkins can turn Everton into ‘strong hypothesis’ for manager – He’s waiting for options to be offered
arts.sum: Everton could become a ‘strong hypothesis’ for Portuguese coach Sérgio Conceição, who is waiting to see what jobs may be available to him. That’s according to Mais Futebol, who report that Conceição is keen to hold off on taking any jobs to see what comes up in the coming weeks. arts.ttl: How to watch Everton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Everton vs Wolves kicks off at 7.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7pm. The show begins about 30 minutes before kick-off at Goodison Park, bringing supporters team news and talking points before the 7.30pm start.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces nightmare Everton situation as Liverpool undroppable walks disciplinary tightrope
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be eager to win his first Merseyside derby at the weekend, but the Liverpool head coach could be without Alexis Mac Allister.
